name: Cloud Setup
about: Propose and configure cloud provider integration for backup/restore

---
### Summary
- What cloud provider(s) are you adding? AWS, Azure, GCP
- What is the expected outcome? Backup/restore flow via SDKs

### Implementation Details
- Provide the approach to authentication (IAM roles, service accounts)
- List of API endpoints that will be used
- Any required tests

### Risks & Mitigations
- Credentials leaks, etc.
